C:\Users\lain\emsdk\upstream\emscripten\emcc.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -sMODULARIZE=1 -sEXPORT_ES6=1 -sEXPORT_NAME=createRatsModule -sENVIRONMENT=web,worker -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sINITIAL_MEMORY=8MB -lwebsocket.js -sALLOW_TABLE_GROWTH=1 "-sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['cwrap','ccall','UTF8ToString','stringToUTF8','lengthBytesUTF8','addFunction','removeFunction']" "-sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=['_malloc','_free','_mc_web_rats_init','_mc_web_rats_connect','_mc_web_rats_send','_mc_web_rats_set_request_callback','_mc_web_rats_dispose']" -O3 @CMakeFiles\rats.dir\objects1.rsp -o rats.js
